creator: vkushnir@bigmir.net
text:
Thanks a bunch! So far your patch works. I've restarted X several
times (a couple of times with just twm + a couple of xterms, and a
couple of times with KDE4) and this far everything seems OK.
BTW, it looks like this patch also fixed another issue - till now when
I exited X, console remained black and so the only way was to switch
to console, restore startx to foreground and kill it with ^C. Not sure
but the last time it looked like X exited just as it's supposed to.
In any case, thanks again - now and then I use 3d, and reboot every
time is a bit inconvenient.

Regards,
Vladimir
